scripts.sync:neural: rm -rf public/Neural-Space-Pro && mkdir -p public && cp -R Neural-Space-Pro public/Neural-Space-Pro
scripts.sync:skydex: rm -rf public/SkyDex4.6 && mkdir -p public && cp -R SkyDex4.6 public/SkyDex4.6
scripts.sync:docxpro: rm -rf public/SkyeDocxPro && mkdir -p public && cp -R SkyeDocxPro public/SkyeDocxPro
scripts.sync:skyeblog: rm -rf public/SkyeBlog && mkdir -p public && cp -R SkyeBlog public/SkyeBlog
scripts.sync:sovereign: rm -rf public/SovereignVariables && mkdir -p public && cp -R SovereignVariables public/SovereignVariables
scripts.sync:surfaces: npm run sync:skye-runtime && npm run sync:skydex && npm run sync:docxpro && npm run sync:skyeblog && npm run sync:sovereign && npm run sync:neural
scripts.deploy:worker: npm --prefix worker clean-install --progress=false && npm --prefix worker run deploy
scripts.deploy:worker:dry: npm --prefix worker clean-install --progress=false && npm --prefix worker run deploy -- --dry-run
